title: diasperus glabrescens
side_effects: Diasperus glabrescens can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing in some individuals. Prolonged consumption of the plant's extract has also been linked to liver damage and gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In rare cases, the improper use of diasperus glabrescens can lead to cardiovascular problems, such as increased heart rate and blood pressure. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using any plant-based remedy to avoid these potential side effects.
